1001401451.korean: 이거? 타이탄 조종해 보고 싶어?&n안돼. 우리 타이탄 섬세하단 말야.

1001401452.english: To think I'm right next to the Commander... it still doesn't feel real.
1001401452.korean: 제가 사령관님 옆에 있다니…&n아직 실감이 안 나요.

1001401453.english: Commander, do you want some chocolate too? Shall I give you one?

1001401454.english: If necessary, I can come back to cover for you. Just give me the order.
1001401454.korean: 뭣하면, 내가 지원 가줄 수&n있어. 명령만 해~.

1001401455.english: I can feel your pain, Commander. What happened today?
1001401455.korean: 사령관님의 아픔이, 느껴져요.&n오늘… 무슨 일이 있었나요?

1001401456.english: I'm a fairy of justice. I'm going to exterminate the pests and save the world. Master, do you want to join me?
1001401456.korean: 난 정의의 요정이야. 해충을&n박멸하고, 세계를 구할 거야.&n주인님도 같이 할래?

1001401457.english: Something I like? Having a drink in secret, right? Want to come along, Commander?
1001401457.korean: 좋아하는 거?&n몰래 한잔하는 거지~!&n같이 갈래 사령관?

1001401458.english: Would you like a cup of tea? Hot or cold. Which would you prefer?
1001401458.korean: 차를 한잔 드릴까요? 따뜻한&n것과, 차가운 것. 어떤 걸&n원하시나요?

1001401459.english: Hmm~! Commander. Want to go get something to drink with me? It's fine, I'll treat.
1001401459.korean: 흐음~! 사령관. 나랑 뭐라도&n마시러 갈까? 괜찮아, 내가 살&n테니까.

1001401460.english: Yeah. I'm pretty free except when I'm on sortie... Um... but, that's a date request, right?
1001401460.korean: 응. 출격 때 빼고는 한가한&n편이야... 어… 근데, 그거&n데이트 신청이지?

1001401461.english: The main target for destruction is an asteroid.

1001401462.english: I do not have an emotion module. I am merely equipped with a similar system.
1001401462.korean: 저는 감정 모듈이 없습니다.&n유사한 시스템이 탑재되어&n있을 뿐입니다.

1001401464.english: There are various methods of assassination. Which method do you prefer, Commander?
1001401464.korean: 암살에는 여러 가지 방법이&n있습니다. 사령관께서는 어떤&n방법을 선호하십니까?

1001401465.english: Yes! Momo is by the Commander's side. How can I help you?
1001401465.korean: 네~! 모모는 사령관님 곁에&n있답니다? 어떤 것을&n도와드릴까요?

1001401466.english: If you're a real man, you should be able to protect your woman.
1001401466.korean: 진짜 남자라면, 자기 여자를&n지킬 수 있어야죠.

1001401467.english: Our commander is really persistent... What can I do for him?
1001401467.korean: 우리 사령관도 정말 끈질기네…&n내가 뭘 해주면 좋을까?

1001401468.english: Hmph. I wish you wouldn't keep talking to me. I tend to like quiet things.
1001401468.korean: 흥. 자꾸 말 걸지 말았으면 좋겠어.&n나 조용한 걸 좋아하는 편이니까.

1001401469.english: Yeah! Cheerleaders would never think their team would lose! Commander, you think so too, right?

1001401470.english: We need to change our perspective on non-combat units!

1001401471.english: I'm a little… lacking inspiration. I need some stimulation…

1001401472.english: Hehe, a competent technician like you... is hard to come by, isn't it?

1001401473.english: This is a foamed concrete bullet. It is a type of expansive cement with a shape-memory alloy added.
1001401473.korean: 이건 발포 콘크리트 탄이에요.&n일종의 팽창 시멘트에 형상&n기억 합금을 넣은 거죠.

1001401474.english: Backstage? It is an empty space, but... why there?
1001401474.korean: 무대 뒤편? 빈 공간이긴&n한데… 거긴 왜?

1001401475.english: My goal... are you asking? Hehe. It is a secret.

1001401476.english: Recording combat data… Dummy data erasure complete.
1001401476.korean: 전투 데이터 기록 중… 더미&n데이터 소거 완료.

1001401477.english: Command execution is the top priority.

1001401478.english: Unfortunately, we did not exist during the War of Annihilation.
1001401478.korean: 안타깝게도 멸망 전쟁 땐&n저희가 존재하지 않았습니다.

1001401479.english: Woohoo~. I won't miss out on tonight. Honey~.

1001401480.english: Hyper Lion is not just a decoration. He is my trustworthy companion who has been with me for thousands of years.
1001401480.korean: 하이퍼 라이언은 장식 따위가&n아니라네. 수천 년을 함께해준&n내 믿음직한 동료지.

1001401481.english: It’s really… really a pretty outfit…! Look at this, it even has wings? Isn’t that amazing?
1001401481.korean: 정말… 정말 예쁜 옷이야…!&n이것 봐, 날개도 달려있다?&n신기하지?

1001401482.english: Commander, Commander~. What are you thinking? Huh? Aren't you going to tell me?
1001401482.korean: 사령관님 사령관님~.&n무슨 생각 하고 계세요? 네?&n안 알려 주실 거예요?

1001401483.english: Toys are fine. I just need my master.

1001401484.english: No? I haven't said who I'm giving it to yet...
1001401484.korean: 아닌데? 누구 줄 건지&n아직… 말 안 했는데?

1001401485.english: Ah~! I want to go have fun… Just… I’m just saying.
1001401485.korean: 아~! 놀러 가고 싶다…&n그냥... 그냥 그렇다구요.

1001401486.english: As expected, a beer after work is the best.

1001401487.english: If only I could perform in front of everyone again… I’d do anything!
1001401487.korean: 모두 앞에서 다시 공연할 수만&n있다면… 전 뭐든지 할 수&n있어요!

1001401488.english: Who should I tell you about today? Kalista? Io? No, it's not just a rumor. I'm telling you, I verified it myself.

1001401489.english: How did you manage to call me out at a time like this! By any chance… do you have a spy?
1001401489.korean: 어떻게 이런 타이밍에 절&n불러내신 건가요! 혹시… 첩자라도&n있는 겁니까?

1001401490.english: Hmm... what should I do to go swimming without getting wet?
1001401490.korean: 흠… 물이 안 묻히면서&n해수욕을 하려면 어떻게 해야&n할까요?

1001401491.english: Miss Audrey told me that my competitors are Captain Khan or Captain Marie.
1001401491.korean: 오드리 양이 말해주더군요. 제&n경쟁자는 칸 대장이나 마리 대장&n정도라고.

1001401492.english: Summer vacation is really enjoyable. But, Your Majesty? Do you really... intend to just sit idly by like this?
1001401492.korean: 여름휴가는 정말 즐겁네요.&n그런데, 폐하? 정말... 이대로&n가만히 계실 생각이신가요?

1001401493.english: Wearing this outfit, it looks like nuclear fusion is happening inside the Commander's body. It's really too easy.
1001401493.korean: 이 옷을 입으니 사령관 몸 안에서&n핵융합이라도 일어난 것 같은데?&n정말 너무 쉽네.

1001401494.english: First off, things to pack… You don’t need a scope, but you do need goggles. Also, a tube, and sunscreen…
1001401494.korean: 일단 챙겨갈 건… 스코프는 필요&n없지만 수경은 필요합니다. 그리고&n튜브, 선크림…

1001401495.english: I am fully aware of what you desire, Master. However, I cannot grant your permission so easily.
1001401495.korean: 소첩은 주인님께서 바라시는 걸&n다 알고 있사옵니다. 하지만 그리&n쉽게 허락해 드릴 순 없지요.

1001401496.english: Yes. First off, shall we gather some information about this area? For starters, there are good restaurants and… well, we can at least get in the mood!
1001401496.korean: 네. 일단 이 지역의 정보를&n모아 볼까요? 일단, 맛집과&n… 뭐 기분은 낼 수 있잖아요!

1001401497.english: Hehe... Are you captivated? I understand.

1001401498.english: We have to deliver the Iron Bugs into the sea! I wonder what will happen then?
1001401498.korean: 철충은 바닷속으로 배달해 줘야&n해! 그럼 어떻게 될까 궁금한데?

1001401499.english: Those bunny ears are so cute! Hehe. Commander, you think so too, right?
1001401499.korean: 토끼 귀 너무 귀여워! 헤헤.&n사령관도 그렇지?

1001401500.english: This notebook really has so many things written in it. Shall we read a few lines? … Haah.
1001401500.korean: 이 수첩에는 정말 많은 것들이 적혀 있지요. 몇 줄 읽어 볼까요? … 하아.

1001401673.english: … Just give me the word… and making you happy is also my duty.
1001401673.korean: … 말씀만 하시면… 주인님을&n즐겁게 하는 것도 임무니까요.

1001401674.english: When did I ever say I saw a human? No way! You're totally mistaken!
1001401674.korean: 내가 언제 인간을 봤다고 그래?&n아니거든? 완전 착각이거든?

1001401675.english: My sword shall exist only for my lord. Forever.
1001401675.korean: 내 검은 오직 주군을 위해&n존재할 걸세. 영원히.

1001401676.english: Even if you see it that way… uh… no! &n If you look at it that way.
1001401676.korean: 그렇게 보셔도… 으… 안 돼요!&n그렇게 보시면.

1001401677.english: How about it? Would you like to educate children who understand my heart together?
1001401677.korean: 어때요? 제 마음을 알아주는&n아이들을 함께 교육하겠어요?

1001401678.english: If the Commander were just a little bit smaller, we could have ridden together on the White Shell... It's such a shame.
1001401678.korean: 사령관님이 조금만 더&n작으셨으면 화이트 쉘에 같이&n탈 수 있었을 텐데… 너무&n아쉬워요.

1001401679.english: In the past, I used to worry about who I should win for... but now that worry has disappeared.
1001401679.korean: 과거엔 누굴 위해 승리해야&n하는가에 대해&n고민했었습니다만… 이젠 고민이&n사라졌습니다.

1001401680.english: Don't worry. There is no one here. So… it means you can indulge in a little bit of greed.
1001401680.korean: 걱정 마십시오. 여긴 아무도&n없습니다. 그러니… 조금쯤 욕심을&n채워도 된다는 말입니다.

1001401681.english: I'm planning to practice singing. You know... I heard that in the previous world, there was a place called a karaoke... and that the two of them used to go there together.
1001401681.korean: 노래는 연습해 둘 생각임다.&n그… 이전 세상에선 노래방이란&n데가 있어서… 둘이 같이 가기도&n했다고 들어서 말임다.

1001401682.english: Commander? You don't need to peek like that. I don't dislike that kind of interest... either.
1001401682.korean: 사령관님? 그렇게 훔쳐보실&n필요 없어요. 그런&n관심은… 저도 싫지 않거든요.

1001401683.english: If I... dress up a little... would I look okay? ...It probably wouldn't work, right?

1001401684.english: I want to create a sea garden... and build our house there.
1001401684.korean: 바다 정원을 만들고… 거기에&n우리의 집을 짓고 싶어요.

1001401685.english: You can relax when you're with me, okay? But if you get too laid back, I start wanting to tease you.
1001401685.korean: 누나랑 있을 땐 긴장 풀어도&n되거든? 그래도 너무 늘어져&n있으면. 누나가 장난치고 싶어져.

1001401686.english: Yes, closer… to make work support a little easier… that’s all.
1001401686.korean: 네, 가까이… 업무 지원을 좀 더&n쉽게 하기 위해서… 그냥 그것&n뿐입니다.

1001401687.english: Someday, I want to cook only for my master.

1001401688.english: I'd rather build a fortress outside the submarine. Put the rest of the kids there...
1001401688.korean: 차라리 잠수함 바깥에 요새를&n지으면 좋겠어요. 나머지 애들을&n거기에...

1001401689.english: Commander, shall we work as a hero duo? I can be the sidekick...
1001401689.korean: 사령관, 우리 2인조 히어로로&n활동할까? 내가 사이드킥을&n해도 되니까...

1001401690.english: Hehe. Commander, shall we break a sweat together? Huh?
1001401690.korean: 히히. 사령관, 우리 같이&n땀이라도 뺄까? 응?

1001401691.english: Commander, Commander, shall I make you happy? Hehe, leave it to me!
1001401691.korean: 사령관, 사령관, 내가 즐겁게&n해줄까? 히히, 맡겨 두라구!

1001401692.english: Yes...? Ah... I was cleaning because it looked like something was on you.
1001401692.korean: 네…? 아... 뭐가 묻으신&n것 같아서 청소 중이었습니다.

1001401693.english: Hmm~ It feels like whenever I'm with my master, I keep drifting further and further away from success. Well... I don't really dislike it.
1001401693.korean: 흐응~ 주인과 함께 있으면,&n출세랑은 자꾸 거리가 멀어지는 것&n같단 말이지.&n뭐… 그렇게 싫진 않아.

1001401694.english: Hehe... Commander, maybe I could come and capture you today?
1001401694.korean: 후후… 사령관, 어쩌면 오늘&n제가 사령관을 함락하러 갈&n수도?

1001401695.english: A joke I learned from the commander… My sisters said it wasn't funny… I think it's funny though…

1001401696.english: Hmm… I don’t really care right now. Just… as long as the Commander is by my side…
1001401696.korean: 음… 지금은 아무래도 좋아요.&n그냥… 사령관이 옆에 있기만&n하다면...

1001401697.english: Don't worry, Commander. I'll always be by your side watching over you.
1001401697.korean: 사령관, 걱정 마. 내가 항상 옆에서&n지켜줄 테니까.

1001401698.english: Please stop being lax with me. If you keep letting your guard down, you'll lose your discipline...
1001401698.korean: 자꾸 저한테 느슨하게 굴지&n말아 주십쇼. 자꾸 마음이&n약해지면 군기가 빠지지&n말입니다...

1001401699.english: I can do my best at whatever you tell me to do, Commander... so please always stay with me!
1001401699.korean: 사령관님이 시키는 건 뭐든지&n열심히 할 수 있으니까…&n그러니까 항상 함께 있어&n주세요!

1001401700.english: There are times when I am grateful for my modified eyes. … Because I can see the Commander a little more clearly.

1001401701.english: Sometimes I just want to give it a lot of stealth features.
1001401701.korean: 가끔씩은 스텔스 기능 따윈&n개나 주고 싶습니다.

1001401702.english: Hehe. Later, when the world becomes peaceful, I'm going to go on lots of dates with the Commander.
1001401702.korean: 히히. 나중에 세상이&n평화로워지면 사령관님이랑&n잔뜩 데이트할 거예요.

1001401703.english: You know my weapon well, right? I’d like to check out the Commander’s weapon today.
1001401703.korean: 내 무기는 잘 알고 있겠지? 오늘은&n사령관의 무기를 확인하고&n싶은데?

1001401704.english: I saw a scene in an old movie where a man puts headphones on a woman. Hmm... should I just switch to these headphones?
1001401704.korean: 옛날 영화에서 남자가 여자 헤드폰&n씌워주는 거 봤어. 음… 아예 이거&n헤드폰으로 바꿔 버릴까?

1001401705.english: Ah… I’m getting a little excited because of that tower dance… Hehehe… Commander?
1001401705.korean: 아… 저 탑돌이 때문에 살짝&n흥분되는데… 흐흐흐… 사령관&n님?

1001401706.english: Come a little closer and talk to me. Then you'll know my temperature right now, Commander, right?
1001401706.korean: 조금 더 가까이 와서 이야기해 줘.&n그럼 사령관 님도 지금 내 온도를&n알겠지?

1001401707.english: Hehe... Come a little closer. If you just hugged me, it would be much easier to escort you.
1001401707.korean: 후후… 조금 더 가까이 오세요.&n아예 절 안아 버리면 호위하기가&n훨씬 쉬워질 텐데.

1001401708.english: Yes. Yes. If you would like to be punished, please tell me anytime. When there is a quiet place.
1001401708.korean: 네. 네. 벌을 받고 싶으시다면&n언제든지 말씀하세요. 조용한 곳이&n있을 때요.

1001401709.english: It’s nice not having to fight. Being able to be with the Commander like this.
1001401709.korean: 전투가 없는 것도 좋군. 사령관과&n이렇게 함께 있을 수 있으니.

1001401710.english: Commander, do you happen to like me? Well, I think it's only natural. I guess you could call it a kind of natural phenomenon...
1001401710.korean: 사령관, 혹시 내가 좋아? 뭐,&n당연하다고 생각해. 일종의 자연&n현상이랄까...

1001401711.english: It may be difficult to find meaning in life in a world like this, but if Your Excellency the Commander becomes the meaning of my existence... I think I can find a little more strength.
1001401711.korean: 이런 세상에선 사는 의미를 찾기&n힘들겠지만 사령관 각하가 제가&n사는 의미가 되어 준다면… 좀 더&n힘을 낼 수 있을 것 같습니다.

1001401712.english: … When I can get the ingredients, I will make you a chocolate cake. Ah, but it is only available on specific dates.
1001401712.korean: … 재료를 얻을 수 있을 때,&n초코케익을 해드리겠습니다.&n아, 특정 날짜에만 가능합니다.

1001401713.english: I got some delicious olives. … I’d like to prepare breakfast for you…

1001401716.english: Commander, shall we play some games just for adults that the other kids can't?

1001401718.english: They say that if it ends well, it’s all good. Being with the Commander like this, I feel good right now.

1001401970.english: Commander, if you look at it that way, I feel like pounceing on you. I mean, in a positive way.

1001401971.english: Since it's just the two of us in such a confined place... I feel like playing a naughty prank.
1001401971.korean: 이렇게 밀폐된 곳에서 둘이만&n있으니… 못된 장난을 치고&n싶어져.

1001401972.english: I don't mind you petting me, but... shouldn't we get back to work soon...

1001401973.english: Why are you slouching like that? I'll fix it for you. Just stay still. Go, I told you to stay still!
1001401973.korean: 자세가 왜 그렇게 구부정해?&n내가 고쳐줄 테니까. 가만히&n있어봐. 가, 가만히 있으래도?!

1001401974.english: If you want, I can prove how gentle a person I am at any time.
1001401974.korean: 원하신다면 언제든지 제가&n얼마나 부드러운 사람인지를&n증명할 수 있어요.

1001401975.english: It's comfortable riding on Xenox when moving around... Hunter will scold you if he sees this, though... Commander, do you want to try riding too...?
1001401975.korean: 이동할 때 제녹스 위에 타면 편해…&n헌터가 보면 혼내지만... 사령관도&n타볼래...?

1001401976.english: That's strange. Why does their expression just relax in front of the Commander?
1001401976.korean: 이상합니다. 왜 사령관 앞에선&n표정이 풀려 버리는 걸까요?

1001401977.english: I know. Commander, you fell head over heels for my 'tragic beauty' side, didn't you? Hmph! Well, my intelligence and beauty are proportional, after all.
1001401977.korean: 알아. 사령관 내 '미인박명'적인&n모습에 확 반한 거지? 훗! 뭐 내&n지성과 미모는 비례하는 거니까.

1001401978.english: If you make me the leader, I will firmly take control of the kids and make them obey you, Commander.
1001401978.korean: 절 리더로 삼아 주시면, 애들을&n확 휘어잡아서 사령관 님께&n순종하게 만들지 말입니다.

1001401979.english: If you stay by my side, Commander… I won’t be afraid.
1001401979.korean: 사령관님이 옆에 있어&n주신다면… 저 겁내지 않을 수&n있어요.

1001401980.english: Recently, I’ve developed a ... crush. Um... I’ll tell you about it next time.

1001401981.english: Chest cutout… Tch! Even gathering that up requires capital, you know?
1001401981.korean: 가슴 트임… 칫! 끌어모으는&n것도 밑천이 있어야 가능한&n겁니다만?

1001401982.english: Being with the Commander makes me happy, even though it's a bit boring. Hmm... Heh. I can't really put it into words.
1001401982.korean: 사령관님이랑 있으면&n심심하긴 해도 행복해져요.&n음… 헷. 말로는 못하겠어요.

1001401983.english: Someday, I’ll prove to the Commander that I’m the best. The other commanders aren’t actually needed by the Commander.
1001401983.korean: 언젠간 사령관에게 내가 최고란 걸&n증명해 줄게. 다른 지휘관들은&n사실 사령관한테 필요 없어.

1001401984.english: Sewing? Shall I do it for you? I want to put rabbit ears on your head, Commander.
1001401984.korean: 바느질? 해줄까? 사령관 님&n머리에도 토끼 귀 달아주고 싶어.

1001401985.english: Hahaha. Just say the word. Reinforcing a part of the body a little more is easy. Is there a specific area you need?
1001401985.korean: 후후후. 말만 하세요. 신체 일부를&n조금 더 보강하는 건 쉬운 일이니.&n혹시 필요한 부위라도?

1001401986.english: What kind of hot game should we play tonight? You're not thinking of fireworks, are you?
1001401986.korean: 오늘 밤엔 무슨 뜨거운 놀이를&n할까? 설마 불꽃놀이 생각하는 건&n아니겠지?

1001401987.english: Master? Don't you have anything to say? How long do I have to wait?
1001401987.korean: 주인님? 할 말 없으세요? 언제까지&n기다려야 하죠?

1001401988.english: Master... becoming a teacher and scolding me... that would be quite fun, wouldn't it?
1001401988.korean: 주인님이… 선생이 돼서, 절 혼내는&n것… 꽤 재미있겠는걸요?

1001401989.english: I'm not used to waiting... Commander... don't you have anything to say to me?
1001401989.korean: 기다리는 건 익숙하지 않은데…&n사령관… 내게 할 말이 없나?

1001401990.english: Hmm… actually, I’m not usually this open and bold… but now there’s no need to close myself off either.
1001401990.korean: 음… 사실 난 이 정도로&n개방적이고 과감한 성격은&n아닌데… 이젠 닫을 필요도 없고.

1001401991.english: I don't know how much longer I'll live... but at least for this moment, I feel happy.
1001401991.korean: 제가 얼마나 더 살지는 몰라도…&n지금 이 순간만큼은 즐거운 기분이&n드네요.

1001401992.english: If you are that bored, I understand. I will look for some kind of game… a wholesome one.
1001401992.korean: 그렇게 심심하시다면 알겠습니다.&n어떤 놀이를…&n… 건전한 놀이를 찾겠습니다.

1001401993.english: I want to get a little slimmer, but... I need enough body fat to fight in the cold... It's absolutely not what I wanted.
1001401993.korean: 조금 더 날씬해지고 싶지만…&n몸에 지방이 충분해야 추운&n곳에서 싸울 수 있어서…&n절대로 제가 원한 게 아니에요.

1001401994.english: Commander, let's play a fun game together.

1001401995.english: … Sometimes I think the Commander is a special person, too. It’s only very occasionally, so please don’t get cocky.
1001401995.korean: … 가끔씩은 사령관도 특별한&n사람이라고 생각해. 아주&n가끔씩이니까 우쭐 거리지 말아줘.

1001401996.english: Don't assume I only call you in emergencies. I mean, I can call you if I want to see you. I mean.

1001401997.english: My body is as perfect as my beauty. Hehe... Would you like to check it out by any chance?

1001401998.english: Well, actually, I've forgotten my old fans. Because now I have something more precious.
1001401998.korean: 뭐, 사실 예전 내 팬들은&n잊었어. 지금은 더 소중한 게&n생겼으니.

1001401999.english: Did I feel unhappy because of my own strength? Hmm... I used to think that way in the past. Now... no, nothing at all.
1001401999.korean: 자력 때문에 불행했냐고?&n음… 예전엔 그렇게 생각한 적도&n있었어. 지금은… 아냐&n아무것도.

1001402000.english: Are you asking if I'm having fun? Of course I am. The Commander is waiting for me, you know.
1001402000.korean: 즐겁냐구? 당연히 즐겁지.&n사령관이 날 기다려 주고 있잖아?

1001402001.english: Master, your hands are… so warm that I feel like I’m going to fall asleep.
1001402001.korean: 주인님 손은… 정말 따뜻해서&n잠이 올 것 같아요.

1001402002.english: Hehe. Commander, should we set off a smoke screen? Then nobody would know what we're doing, right?
1001402002.korean: 히히. 사령관님 연막이라도&n피울까요? 그럼 우리가 뭐&n하는지 아무도 모를 텐데?

1001402003.english: Hehe. As long as the Commander is happy, I don't care what you say.

1001402004.english: Huh? A secret weapon? Hmm... Should I make one for you, big brother?
1001402004.korean: 응? 비밀 무기?&n음… 오빠한테도 하나 만들어 줄까?

1001402005.english: Even if you ask me to do something like that... I... don't know what to do...
1001402005.korean: 그런 일을… 시키셔도…&n제가... 어떻게 해야 할지…

1001402006.english: No, I'm not busy. Right now, I want to talk to the Commander alone... How was your day?
1001402006.korean: 아니, 바쁜 일 없어. 지금은&n사령관이랑 둘이서 이야기하고&n싶어… 오늘... 어땠어?

1001402007.english: Falling for the person giving orders... is a common thing, you know...
1001402007.korean: 며… 명령을 내리는 사람에게&n반하는 건… 흔한 일이라구...

1001402008.english: I'm sorry... I wished you... would be kind only to me...

1001402009.english: I have a weapon that my older sisters don't have! And that is...!

1001402010.english: Do you know? The Commander looks cutest when he yawns. So... don't show it to the others.
1001402010.korean: 그거 알아? 사령관은 하품하는&n모습이 제일 귀여워.&n그러니까... 다른 애들한테는&n보여주지 마.

1001402011.english: Access permission verified. Doom Bringer Team. 'B' size, view… Hmm~ No, Commander. Please focus your efforts elsewhere~.
1001402011.korean: 접근 권한 확인. 둠 브링어 팀.&n‘B’사이즈, 열람…&n으음~ 안돼요 사령관님.&n다른 곳에 힘써주세요~.

1001402012.english: Hehe! Since the Commander is here, I don't want to leave, you know? Actually, I'm super lazy, you know?
1001402012.korean: 헤헷! 사령관이 여기 있으니까,&n나가기 싫은 거 있지? 나 사실&n엄청 게으르거든?

1001402013.english: Ah! I want to go shopping arm in arm with the Commander. Huh? You don't like shopping... Why on earth?
1001402013.korean: 아~! 사령관이랑 팔짱 끼고&n쇼핑 다니고 싶다.&n어? 쇼핑은 별로라니... 대체 왜?

1001402015.english: Defeating the villains is important, but... right now... I want to be with you, Commander.
1001402015.korean: 악당을 물리치는 것도&n중요하지만... 지금은...&n사령관님과 같이 있고&n싶은걸요?

1001402016.english: Just tell me what you want. I'll grant whatever you need.
1001402016.korean: 원하는 건, 말씀만 하세요. 제가&n뭐든 들어 드릴 테니까요.

1001402017.english: Commander, have confidence. You are the only person I do not look down on.
1001402017.korean: 사령관, 자신감을 가져. 사령관은&n내가 내려다보지 않는 유일한&n사람이니.

1001402018.english: Commander, you look like you have a lot on your mind. Could it be... Don't worry. Commander, I'm not that picky!
1001402018.korean: 사령관, 고민이 많은 얼굴이네?&n혹시… 걱정 마. 사령관, 나 그렇게&n눈이 높진 않으니까!

1001402019.english: Th-that kind of... request is always a pass, but... do you... want to see it that much?

1001402020.english: Commander, won't you go easy on the training? Then I... I can put in even more effort!
1001402020.korean: 사령관 님, 훈련을 봐주시지&n않겠어요? 그럼 저... 더 힘낼 수&n있으니까!

1001402021.english: Well... considering that the finishing touch to fashion is the face... hmm... it seems like the Commander is almost complete.

1001402022.english: The Commander looks really tired these days, you know? Do you want me to make something for you?

1001402023.english: I always feel energized when I am with the Commander.

1001402024.english: Um... Commander. If you don't like it... should I... only wear the stage costume in front of you?
1001402024.korean: 저… 사령관. 사령관이&n싫으면… 무대 의상은…&n사령관 앞에서만 입을까?

1001402025.english: I am glad that my skills can be of assistance to both combat and pleasure.

1001402026.english: The Commander is always so nice to me, isn't he? I want to do something for him too. By any chance... do you like sweets?

1001402027.english: There are so many things we can do just the two of us. So… um… I’ll be the police. Hehe~.

1001402028.english: Hng... I like it best when Master strokes my head! Please keep stroking it over and over.

1001402029.english: It's in my front pocket, so take it out and... Ugh! I told you not to keep putting your hand in there...?

1001402030.english: Still, I'm glad that I think I met a really good person.

1001402031.english: Just for today... can't I rest with the Commander? Just for one day.

1001402032.english: Ugh! How could you give up the hat feathers? Miss Marie really doesn't know what 'style' is!
1001402032.korean: 읏! 어떻게 모자의 깃털을&n포기할 수 있지요? 마리 양은&n정말 ‘멋’을 모른다니까요?

1001402034.english: Why the look on your face? You say you can't see underwater... I don't know what you mean...

1001402035.english: I'm grateful to Miss Amy. Hehe... But she said that if things go well, the three of us should meet... I wonder what that means?

1001402036.english: Your Majesty's gaze... is truly unbearable... Your Majesty? Looking at me right now... what are you thinking?

1001402037.english: Even I... don't want to fight while having my time alone with the Commander interrupted.

1001402039.english: … The other children have been put to sleep. Don't worry. It is not a dangerous medicine.
1001402039.korean: … 다른 아이들은 잠재워&n두었습니다. 걱정 마십시오.&n위험한 약은 아니 옵니다.

1001402040.english: When I hear ghost stories, I get scared, but I also wish they were true. Because then we could stay together forever.
1001402040.korean: 귀신 이야길 들으면&n무섭다가도 진짜였음&n좋겠다는 생각도 해. 그럼 계속&n같이 있을 수 있으니까.

1001402041.english: Hehe. Looking around... Are you perhaps looking for a place to be alone with me? I've already found one.

1001402042.english: Don't worry. No matter where he is, there's no way you won't be able to find the Commander.
1001402042.korean: 걱정 마. 어디에 있건 사령관을&n못 찾을 리는 없을 테니까.

1001402043.english: Is it true that even being a bunny girl gives you strength? Then there’s no reason not to cheer for you.

1001402115.english: Oh? You must have liked what I prepared? Hehehe. Then now... it's my turn to taste it... right?

1001402134.english: I'm sorry for looking like this... I'll change right away.

1001402135.english: Hehe, got you. My hand is a bit cold, isn't it?

1001402136.english: Master? Is there anything to praise today?

1001402137.english: A toy snake… *Sigh*… Does Neri really think this is fun?
1001402137.korean: 장난감 뱀이라니…&n하아… 네리 씨는 이게 정말&n재밌다고 생각하는 걸까요?

1001402138.english: As long as I am here, no one gets hurt.

1001402139.english: Commander! I’ve got some good information. What do you think? Want to hear it?

1001402140.english: Life has no inherent value. In the end, it is merely a survival machine following the commands of genes.

1001402141.english: Hehe, Aqua wanted to come to the sea with Master too... but I ended up coming first.

1001402142.english: I wish I had learned a few more lyrics...

1001402234.korean: 힛힛힛! 오늘도 보팔 래빗이&n간식으로 빵빵하구나!&n… 으응… 몇 개 꺼내 먹을까?

1001402235.english: These robots are practically my friends. I even gave them names a long time ago... um... what was their name again?
1001402235.korean: 이 로봇들은 제 친구나&n다름없다구요. 예전에 이름도&n지어줬었는데… &n음… 이름이 뭐였… 더라?

1001402236.english: Please let me know if you have any concerns. I will pray with you anytime.

1001402237.english: This world is all about taking or being taken. Of course, I am the one who takes... Hehe.
1001402237.korean: 이 세상은 빼앗거나&n빼앗기거나에요. 물론 전 빼앗는&n존재죠… 후훗.

1001402238.english: Are you talking about Pokkuru? ... I can't trust her yet.
1001402238.korean: 뽀끄루 말씀이신가요? &n… 아직은 신뢰할 수 없어요.

1001402239.english: You want to hear my secret, right? Got it. Come to my room later. Do you want me to tell you the password?
1001402239.korean: 내 비밀 이야기가 듣고 싶은&n거지? 알았어~. 나중에 내&n방으로 와. 패스워드 알려줄까?

1001402240.english: Phew... Sometimes... someone... knocks me down... Heh. Just kidding.
1001402240.korean: 후우… 가끔씩은… 누군가 절...&n쓰러 트려… 훗. 농담이에요.

1001402241.english: Ha... come on. Stop glancing at me. You could have just looked at me confidently... How about it? What do you think?
1001402241.korean: 하~ 참~, 힐끔힐끔 보지 말고,&n당당하게 날 바라보면 되잖아…&n어때? 감상은?

1001402242.english: Oh~? Master! You're following along better than I thought? I guess you wanted to make it big just like me, too?
1001402242.korean: 오~? 주인! 생각보다 잘&n따라오는데? 역시 주인도&n나처럼 출세하고 싶었구나?

1001402243.english: Still, just once… I’d like to go out and hang out with the Commander. Is… that okay?
1001402243.korean: 그래도 한 번쯤은…&n사령관님과 놀러 나가고&n싶어요. 그래도… 될까요?

1001402244.english: Ba, Ban… Human male! What is today’s plan? Let’s make a plan together to create a just world.
1001402244.korean: 바, 반… 인간 남성! 오늘의 계획은&n어떻게 되죠? 올바른 세상을 만들&n계획을 함께 세워보죠.

1001402245.english: Um... honestly... it is basically chasing fish with a fish finder... but... that's also a kind of conversation! Don't you know what communication is?
1001402245.korean: 음… 솔직히 말하면… 어군&n탐지기로 물고길 쫓아가는 거긴&n한데… 그… 그것도 일종의&n대화라고! 커뮤니케이션 몰라?

1001402246.english: Sister Lise is fine now. I was just… worried that I might be a burden to the Master…
1001402246.korean: 리제 언니는 이제 괜찮아요.&n전 그저… 주인님께 누가 될까 봐…

1001402247.english: When the spring rain falls… I want to stroll with my Master. … Just the two of us…
1001402247.korean: 봄비가 내릴 땐… 주인님과 함께&n거닐고 싶어요. … 둘이서만…

1001402248.english: Um... if the chance arises, wouldn't you give me a chance to... reconcile with the Elven?
1001402248.korean: 저… 기회가 된다면 엘븐과...&n화해할 기회를 주시지&n않겠습니까?

1001402249.english: I thought that if I wore this outfit… I would feel a little closer to Your Excellency. How about you, Your Excellency?
1001402249.korean: 이 옷을 입으면… 각하와 조금 더&n가까운 기분을 느낄 수 있을&n거라고 생각했습니다. 각하께선&n어떤가요?

1001402250.english: Swimming is good, and running is good too.&nHuh? Commander, are you tired? Why, the sound of your breathing keeps…
1001402250.korean: 수영도 좋고 달리기도 좋아요.&n응? 사령관님 힘들어요? 왜&n자꾸 숨소리가…

1001402251.english: Seriously! I'm telling you I haven't gained weight! Do you want me to prove it to you right now?

1001402252.english: Your eyes keep wandering toward the other bioroids... If you do that again, I’ll give you a good scolding. Hehe. Are you curious?
1001402252.korean: 자꾸 다른 바이오로이드들에게&n눈이 돌아가시는데… 또 그러시면&n혼내 드리겠어요. 후후.&n궁금하신가요?

1001402253.english: Hehe~! Don't be shy, try repeating after me. Alright- Lin.ti. Once again~. Lin.ti.
1001402253.korean: 후훗~! 부끄러워하지 말고, 절&n따라 해보세요. 자아- 린.티.&n다시 한번~. 린.티.

1001402254.english: I like that the swimsuit is pretty, but... I like it even more because the Commander picked it out for me.
1001402254.korean: 수영복이 예쁜 것도 마음에&n들지만… 사령관이 골라준&n거라서 더 마음에 들어.

1001402255.english: Sometimes… I think… aren’t Iron Bugs more threatening than Demons?
1001402255.korean: 가끔씩은… 마족보다…&n철충이 더 위협적이지 않나&n생각할 때가 있어요.

1001402256.english: Um... later, when the fighting stops... how about hiring me as a singer? I'm confident in that...
1001402256.korean: 저.... 나중에 싸움이 없어지면….&n절 가수로 고용해 보는 건 어때요?&n그쪽은 자신 있는데....

1001402257.english: Don't worry. When we go to the moon, Momo will be holding you tight, Commander.
1001402257.korean: 걱정 마세요 달에 갈 땐 모모가&n사령관님을 꼭 끌어안고 있을&n테니까요.

1001402258.english: The outfit is a bit over the top, but... I like it.
1001402258.korean: 복장이 조금 과한 면은 있지만.&n그래도... 마음에 들어요.

1001402259.english: Commander...? You thought to yourself... that I was a nuisance, didn't you? Right? You can't think that. I'm going to teach you a lesson!
1001402259.korean: 사령관...? 지금 속으로...제가&n귀찮다고 생각하셨죠? 그렇죠?&n그러면 안 돼요.&n제가 혼내줄 거예요!

1001402260.english: A campfire? Oh, okay. I'll just do it for you... but instead, you're the one getting the firewood, okay?
1001402260.korean: 캠프파이어? 아, 알았어.&n해주면 되잖아… &n대신, 장작은 당신이 구하는 거다?

1001402261.english: Nymph just took three chocolate bars, so there aren't any left. Alvis will get some for you later, so you have to wait patiently.
1001402261.korean: 초코바는 님프 언니가 방금 세&n개나 가져가서 이제 없어.&n알비스가 나중에 구해줄 테니까,&n얌전히 기다리고 있어야 돼.

1001402262.english: Hmph! You shouldn't call your older sister immature! ...Anyway, I'm thinking of going out tonight... Can you give me some supplies? Aww. Please~.
1001402262.korean: 흥! 누나한테 철없다는 소리&n하는 거 아니야!&n...그건 그렇고, 나 오늘 밤에&n놀러 나갈 생각인데… 보급품&n좀 줄 수 있어? 아앙. 부탁해~.

1001402263.english: Commander? What kind of subordinate am I to you? Ah, no… I asked a trivial question… Please forget it.
1001402263.korean: 사령관? 나는 사령관에게 어떤&n부하인가? 아, 아니… 내가 시시한&n질문을 했군… 잊어다오.

1001402264.english: Now that the Commander is here, I don't envy the other sisters anymore. … You'll always be by my side, right?
1001402264.korean: 사령관이 여기 있으니,&n나 더 이상 다른 자매들이 부럽지&n않아. … 사령관은 언제나&n내 옆에 있어 줄 거지?

1001402265.english: Huh? Th-this is a philosophy book, I'm telling you! I'm telling you, it's true!
1001402265.korean: 엥? 이, 이거 철학 책&n맞다니까?! 진짜라니까?

1001402266.english: Sometimes I wonder what it would be like if I were born a normal girl. Hehe.
1001402266.korean: 가끔씩은 평범한 여자애로 태어났으면 어땠을까 싶어요. 후훗.

1001402267.english: I... what should I do now? I have work to do, but why do I keep thinking only of His Majesty?
1001402267.korean: 전... 이제 어떻게 해야 하죠?&n해야 할 일이 있는데, 어째서&n폐하의 생각만 떠오르는&n걸까요?

1001402268.english: I can't grant such unreasonable requests. So… please let me do it only occasionally. Got it?
1001402268.korean: 너무 무리한 요구는 들어드릴 수&n없어요. 그러니까… 가끔씩만&n시켜주세요. 아셨죠?

1001402269.english: Huh? My Vorpal Rabbit? This is a gift from Valkyrie. There were snacks inside, too?
1001402269.korean: 응? 내 보팔 래빗? 이건&n발키리 언니가 선물해 준거야.&n안에 간식도 들어있었다?

1001402270.english: Hmm… By the way, Familiar. What was your name? … Right! That’s correct. It was 'Cute Commander,' wasn't it?
1001402270.korean: 음… 그런데 퍼밀리어야.&n네 이름이 뭐였니? … 그래! 맞아.&n‘귀여운 사령관님’이었지?

1001402271.english: You must be careful not to become corrupted by desire. If you are having a hard time, I suppose I could help you.
1001402271.korean: 욕망 때문에 타락하는 건&n주의하셔야 합니다. 힘드시면&n제가 도와드릴 수도 있겠군요.

1001402272.english: No one can enter Master's dreams. Just you and me... just the two of us... Hehehe... What shall we try?
1001402272.korean: 주인님의 꿈만은 아무도 들어올 수&n없어요. 주인님과 저… 둘이서만…&n후후후… 뭘 해볼까요?

1001402273.english: Pokkuru is... a precious colleague. I am ashamed that I doubted her...

1001402275.english: The kids all know something's going on between the two of us... Yeah! And the rumors have spread... Now... what are you going to do...
1001402275.korean: 우리 둘이 무슨 일 있는 거,&n애들이 다 알고 있던데… 응!&n그것도 소문 다 났어… 이제…&n어떻게 할 거야…

1001402276.english: I want to use my strength solely for you, Commander. So… um… do you understand what I mean?
1001402276.korean: 제 힘은 오직 사령관님을 위해&n쓰고 싶어요. 그러니… 음… 제&n말 무슨 뜻인지 아시겠어요?

1001402277.english: If I just sit around with the Commander… &n… I’m craving donuts… This is a big problem, &na big problem…
1001402277.korean: 사령관이랑 가만히 있으면…&n… 도넛이 당기네… 큰일이야,&n큰일…

1001402278.english: Shower~. What? Where are you... going together right now? Master... I heard that right, right?
1001402278.korean: 샤워~. 뭐? 지금 어딜... 같이&n간다고? 주인... 내가 잘못&n들은 거 맞지?

1001402279.english: However, I’d like to get closer to you, Commander. What do you think, Commander?
1001402279.korean: 그렇지만, 전 사령관님과 더&n친해지고 싶은걸요?&n사령관님은, 어떻게&n생각하세요?

1001402280.english: My dear. Don't worry. I will take care of the concubines' trivial matters, so please just focus on the important things.
1001402280.korean: 반려. 걱정 마세요. 첩들의 사소한&n일은 제가 관리할 테니. 반려께선&n중요한 일만 신경 써 주세요.

1001402281.english: I don't know. Now, I like being with the Commander more than hitting the jackpot. You feel the same way, Commander, right? Huh? Huh?
1001402281.korean: 몰라. 이젠 대박보다 사령관하고&n있는 게 더 좋아. 사령관도 그렇지?&n응? 응?

1001402282.english: I will lend you my lap, so please rest for a moment. Even if you fall asleep... I will protect you, Master.
1001402282.korean: 무릎을 빌려 드릴 테니 잠깐&n쉬세요. 혹시 잠드셔도… 제가&n주인님을 지킬 테니.

1001402283.english: Hehe. You can treat me like an older sister, Master. Ah, like an older sister. Just like that. It would be troublesome if I actually became an older sister.
1001402283.korean: 후후. 주인님도 절 누나처럼&n여기셔도 돼요. 아,&n누나처럼이에요. 처럼. 정말&n누나가 되어 버리면 곤란하니까.

1001402284.english: I can't tell if I'm sweating right now because of the work... or because of the Commander.
1001402284.korean: 지금 땀이 나는 게… 작업&n때문인지… 사령관 님&n때문인지 구분할 수가&n없습니다.

1001402285.english: … I was secretly worried that he might dislike women who are excessively large. … I am truly… relieved.
1001402285.korean: … 지나치게 큰 여성을 싫어하시진&n않을까... 내심 걱정했었습니다.&n정말… 다행입니다.

1001402286.english: I’m fine wherever the Commander is. Because the Commander is here.
1001402286.korean: 난 사령관님이 있는 곳이면&n어디든 좋아요. 사령관님이&n있으니까요.

1001402287.english: It's sad that humans perished, but I'm glad the Commander survived. Commander, you always have to be careful!
1001402287.korean: 인간님들이 멸망한 건 슬프지만&n사령관이 살아남아서 기뻐.&n사령관, 항상 조심해야 해!

1001402288.english: You are worrying about something truly trivial. Others only look at me. Like a flower on a cliff.
1001402288.korean: 정말 하찮은 걱정을 하시는군요.&n다른 이들은 절 보는 게 끝이에요.&n절벽 위의 꽃처럼.

1001402289.english: So, Linty decided to become the cutest soldier in the world. Therefore, Commander, you have to help Linty too. Got it?
1001402289.korean: 그래서, 린티는 세상에서 제일&n귀여운 군인이 되기로&n결심했죠. 그러니까,&n사령관님도 린티를&n도와주셔야 해요. 아셨죠?

1001402290.english: Why are you staring at me like that? Ugh... your eyes are sly. You're doing this on purpose, aren't you? Well, well... looking is your freedom, so... I can't really stop you, but...
1001402290.korean: 왜 그렇게 뚫어져라 보는&n거야? 으… 눈이 음흉해.&n일부러 그러는 거지? 뭐, 뭐…&n보는 건 자유니까… 내가 말릴&n수도 없지만…

1001402291.english: Maybe, even with love, you can fill the Moonlight & Magical Power… Ah, please forget about it.
1001402291.korean: 어쩌면, 사랑으로도 문 라이트&n매지컬 파워를… 채울 수 있을&n지도… 아, 잊어 주세요.

1001402292.english: Hmph… If the boss wishes… “Hehe… Do you desire my favor?”
1001402292.korean: 히잉… 사장님이 원하시면…&n“후후… 나의 총애를 바라느냐?”

1001402293.english: When it's time for me to go, just hold my hand and recite a spell. Tell them you love them...
1001402293.korean: 제가 가야 할 때. 손을 잡고&n주문을 외워주시면 돼요.&n사랑한다고요…

1001402294.english: My younger siblings are all such sweet kids… enough to make me worried…

1001402295.english: I knew this would happen. You didn't put the plate on, did you? Come here quickly. Ah, hurry up.
1001402295.korean: 이럴 줄 알았어요~.&n플레이트 안 끼우셨죠?&n얼른 이리 와봐요. 아, 얼른요~.

1001402296.english: I call you 'you' just because I'm used to it. There's no other meaning behind it.
1001402296.korean: 내가 ‘당신’이라고 부르는 건,&n그냥 익숙해서 그러는 거야.&n다른 뜻은 없다고.

1001402297.english: If Alvis is in danger, you have to come help, Commander. You promised, right? Make it happen, okay?
1001402297.korean: 알비스가 위험하면&n사령관님이 도와주러 와야 해.&n약속했다? 꼭이다?

1001402298.english: If you're bored, want to go shopping with me? What's the big deal? It's just the Commander and me anyway.
1001402298.korean: 심심하면 나랑 쇼핑이라도&n갈까? 뭐 어때~. 어차피&n사령관이랑 나밖에 없는 걸?

1001402299.english: Hmm... Commander? The ceremonial uniform... isn't meant to be worn in a situation like that... so please act cautiously.
1001402299.korean: 흠…. 사령관? 의장복은… 그런&n상황에서 입는 옷이 아니니… 부디&n신중하게 행동해 줬으면 한다.

1001402300.english: So the Commander loves me? ... I love you too. Shall I give you a hug?
1001402300.korean: 사령관은 날 사랑해 주는구나?&n… 나도 사랑해. 내가 안아줄까?

1001402301.english: Ah, no! Don't take my book... Hey, listen... Shall we go out for some fresh air for a bit? Ah! Don't do that...
1001402301.korean: 아, 안돼! 내 책 가져가지 마…&n이, 있지... 우리 잠깐&n바람이라도 쐬러 나갈까?&n아! 하지마아…

1001402302.english: Commander? Could you keep the things that happened with you a secret from the squad? Please…
1001402302.korean: 사령관님? 사령관님과 있었던 그 일은 대원들에게 비밀로 해주시겠어요? 부탁드려요…

1001402303.english: May I be fully worthy in assisting Your Majesty. And may I be able to be with Your Majesty forever…
1001402303.korean: 폐하를 보좌하는데, 부족함이&n없기를. 그리고, 언제까지나&n폐하와 함께할 수 있기를…

1001402304.english: I couldn't help it because there weren't any magic outfits in my size, but this underwear fits me. I wear things a little small...
1001402304.korean: 마법 복장은 맞는 사이즈가 없어서&n어쩔 수 없었지만, 이 속옷은 제가&n입던 게 맞아요.&n제가 조금 작게 입거든요…

1001402305.english: Commander. I'm sorry Alvis bit you... Did it hurt a lot? I'll put some medicine on it, so please wait a moment.

1001402389.english: I regret that day's oath. &n I should have prepared something more thrilling.
1001402389.korean: 그날의 서약은 후회가 되네요.&n좀 더 찌릿한 걸 준비했어야 하는데.

1001402390.english: Ugh… Commander… please don't talk about that last time… &n my face gets hot. &n My shells are sensitive to heat.
1001402390.korean: 으… 사령관 님… 저번에 그 일에&n대해선 이야기하지마… 얼굴이&n뜨거워지니까.&n내 포탄은 열에 약하다고.

1001402391.english: Master, sometimes when I caress the gift from that day… &n I wish only the two of us were left in the world.
1001402391.korean: 주인님, 가끔씩 그날의 선물을&n쓰다듬을 땐… 세상에 우리 둘만&n남기고 싶단 생각이 들곤 해요.

1001402392.english: The stored item? Well, I don't know. Wait, &n gloves don't matter! Why do you want to &n take off the gloves...?
1001402392.korean: 보관한 물건요? 그, 글쎄요? 잠깐,&n장갑은 상관 없어요! 어째서 장갑을&n벗기려고...

1001402393.english: If the Commander keeps being frustrating, &n I'll take the lead. Remember that.
1001402393.korean: 사령관이 자꾸 답답하게 굴면&n내가 리드할 거야. 기억해.

1001402394.english: Hehe. Commander, actually I've boasted about a few things… &n Is that okay? You'll forgive me, right?
1001402394.korean: 헤헤. 사령관, 사실 나 몇 가지 허풍친게&n있는데… 괜찮지? 용서해 줄 거지?

1001402395.english: I've never felt like this… thinking about that day with Your Excellency & makes me happy.
1001402395.korean: 이런 적 없는데… 각하와의 그날을&n생각하면 행복해 집니다.

1001402396.english: You want me to say what I said last time? &n I absolutely won't.
1001402396.korean: 저번에 했던 말을 하라고요?&n저, 절대 안 할 겁니다.

1001402397.english: The oath day? That day… please forget it! &n That wasn't me!
1001402397.korean: 서약 날이요? 그날… 그건 잊어주세요!&n그건 제가 아니었어요!

1001402398.english: My heart pounds! I'm always happy because of you, Commander.

1001402399.english: Commander, don't show how much you like me. &n It's hard for me to keep a straight face too.
1001402399.korean: 사령관, 너무 좋아하는 티를 내지 마.&n나도 표정을 굳히는 게 힘드니까.

1001402400.english: Commander, don't worry. I promise not to get a drop of water &n on my hands.
1001402400.korean: 사령관, 걱정 마. 손에 물 한 방울&n안묻힌다는 약속은 지킬 테니까.

1001402401.english: You wouldn't just leave me thinking I'm a caught fish, right? &n You always have to try.
1001402401.korean: 설마 잡힌 물고기라고 생각하면서&n내버려두진 않겠죠?&n항상 노력해야 해요?

1001402402.english: The token? Uh, yeah! Of course I have it! &n Look, here… oh, huh…?
1001402402.korean: 증표? 으, 응! 당연히 갖고 있지!&n봐봐, 여기… 어, 어라…?

1001402403.english: Hmm… the day the Commander gave me a gift? &n ...I was happy. Really.
1001402403.korean: 음… 사령관이 선물 주던 날?&n...행복했어. 정말로.

1001402404.english: I want to go out with the Commander… &n If you like me… will you take me with you?
1001402404.korean: 나 사령관이랑 놀러 가고 싶어…&n사령관이 좋다면… 날 데려가 줄래?

1001402405.english: Hehe… okay, master. I like it so much. &n Stay with me every day.
1001402405.korean: 헤헤… 좋아요 주인님. 너무 좋아요.&n맨날 같이 있어줘요.

1001402406.english: Commander, is there anything you want to eat?&nAnything? Hehe, me too. If I'm with the Commander,&nanything will taste delicious!
1001402406.korean: 사령관님, 드시고 싶으신 건 있으신가요?&n아무거나? 헤헤, 저도 똑같아요. 사령관님과&n함께라면 무엇을 먹어도 맛있을 거예요!

1001402407.english: Hehe. So pretty… Commander, the token is &n really pretty.

1001402408.english: Hehe. At the oath? Of course it was good. No way...
1001402408.korean: 헤헤. 서약 때? 당연히 좋았지. 설마...

1001402409.english: Hehe… us… Commander. &n Shall I prepare something for you?
1001402409.korean: 헤헤… 우리… 사령관님.&n제가 뭐라도 챙겨 드릴까요?

1001402410.english: I'm watching everything the Commander does. &n So... if you get distracted, know you'll get scolded.
1001402410.korean: 사령관이 뭘 하는지는 다~ 보고 있지.&n그러니까... 한눈 팔면 혼날줄 알어.

1001402411.english: Get along well with friends. &n Ah! Of course… treat me a little... specially…
1001402411.korean: 친구들과 사이 좋게 지내줘.&n아! 물론… 나는 좀... 특별히 대해줘…

1001402412.english: I remember the words that you won't leave my side. &n I'm happy because of you...
1001402412.korean: 제 곁을 떠나지 않겠다는 그 말을 기억&n하고 있어요. 저는 당신 덕분에&n행복해요...

1001402413.english: Master? You have to teach me everything from now on, &n you know? Yeah~ I like that too!
1001402413.korean: 주인님? 앞으로도 전부 가르쳐 줘야해,&n알고있지? 응~ 나도 좋아해!

1001402414.english: If I knew I'd be held tight like this… &n I wouldn't have done those things~ He~ Just kidding, you fool.
1001402414.korean: 이렇게 꽉 잡혀 살 줄 알았으면…&n그런 거 안했지~ 헤~ 농담이야 바보야.

1001402415.english: Commander always has such grace. &n I... want to be like that Commander.
1001402415.korean: 사령관님은 늘 기품이 넘치세요.&n저는... 그런 사령관님을 닮고싶어요.

1001402416.english: Living a life on the move every day wasn't really &n good... now... I just want to be by the Commander's side.
1001402416.korean: 매일 이동하는 삶이 딱히 좋진&n않았거든... 이제... 사령관 옆에만&n있고 싶어.

1001402417.english: Am I going to keep holding you like this? I have plans with the kids...&nYou'll understand, right? Hmm, then...&nShall I stay like this a little longer...?
1001402417.korean: 이렇게 계속 안고 있을 거야?&n나 애들이랑 약속 있는데...&n이해해 줄 거라고? 으음, 그럼...&n좀만 더 이러고 있을까...?

1001402418.english: Commander's magical girl will grant one wish today. &n What do you want?
1001402418.korean: 사령관님의 마법 소녀가 오늘은&n소원을 하나 들어 드릴게요.&n어떤 걸 원하세요?

1001402419.english: When you're looking at me, I can't do anything. &n It feels like… I'm prey.
1001402419.korean: 그대가 절 보고 있을 땐, 전 아무것도&n할 수 없어요. 마치… 사냥감이 된&n기분이에요.

1001402420.english: Commander, sometimes I want to fly with you &n up in the sky. Put it on autopilot… Hehehe...
1001402420.korean: 사령관, 가끔씩 사령관을 태우고&n하늘로 가고 싶어. 자동 비행 모드로&n해놓고… 헤헤헤...

1001402421.english: Commander, why are you laughing? Surely… it's not because I was a little &n startled that day? &n I wasn't embarrassed or touched that day.. Are you listening?
1001402421.korean: 사령관, 왜 웃는 거야? 설마… 그 날&n내가 살짝 놀란 것 때문은 아니지?&n나 그날 절대 당황하거나 감격한 거&n아니니까.. 듣고 있어?

1001402422.english: Thanks to you, Commander, I realized I can &n be helpful too. Thank you, Commander.
1001402422.korean: 사령관 덕분에, 나도 도움이 될 수&n있다는걸 알게됐어. 고마워 사령관.

1001402423.english: No matter how much I like you, Commander, &n I won't give up my dreams. For you, &n Commander.
1001402423.korean: 사령관님이 아무리 좋아도 꿈을&n포기하진 않을 거예요. 사령관 님을&n위해서라도요.

1001402424.english: Hehe. You must feel how nice it is &n when someone takes care of you nearby.
1001402424.korean: 후후. 옆에서 누군가 챙겨준다는 게&n얼마나 좋은지는 느끼고 있겠죠?

1001402425.english: Of course~ There's no one but me, right? Sorry to the other &n sisters, but Commander is mine~
1001402425.korean: 역시~ 이 누나밖에 없는거지? 다른&n동생들한테는 미안하지만,&n사령관은 내 거거든~

1001402426.english: …Still… genetically and legally we're not family, &n thank goodness.

1001402427.english: No one noticed, right? Commander, &n let's go somewhere with no one around. Quickly!
1001402427.korean: 아무한테도 안 들켰지? 사령관,&n빨리 아무도 없는 곳으로 가자. 빨리!

1001402428.english: I belong to my master, and my master belongs to me. &n Don't forget that.
1001402428.korean: 전 주인의 것, 주인은 소첩의&n것이옵니다. 잊지 마시옵소서.

1001402429.english: Sweet love is always followed by &n precious fruits♡
1001402429.korean: 달콤한 사랑 뒤엔, 소중한&n결실이 따르는 법이죠♡

1001402430.english: Commander, you like to stroke my head, right? &n Yes.! Don't worry, do as you please.
1001402430.korean: 사령관은 머리 쓰다듬는걸 좋아하는&n구나? 응.! 신경쓰지말고 마음대로 해.

1001402431.english: Now, Commander, you are mine! &n So, please play with me every day.
1001402431.korean: 이제 사령관님은 제 거예요!&n그러니까, 저랑 매일 매일 놀아주세요.

1001402432.english: Master, even if Hachiko gets heavy later, &n you'll still hold me, right? Right?

1001402433.english: From now on, I'll make chocolates. &n If you get them from others, you'll be in trouble.
1001402433.korean: 앞으로 초콜릿은 내가 만들어줄게.&n다른애들한테 받으면 혼날줄 알어.

1001402434.english: Did I bully you, Commander? &n Me? When did I?

1001402435.english: Hehe, I prepared a secret line, &n so please use it only for personal matters.
1001402435.korean: 헤헷, 비밀 회선도 준비했으니까,&n진~짜. 개인적인 용무로만 써주세요.

1001402436.english: To be treated with such care… &n I'm really glad to have met Your Majesty.
1001402436.korean: 이렇게까지 신경 써주시다니…&n폐하를 만나서 정말 다행이에요.

1001402437.english: Hehe, Commander. Can I get a few more hairpins? &n No? Why? Ah, I gave permission for no reason!
1001402437.korean: 헤헤, 사령관님. 나, 머리핀 몇 개 더&n구해와도 돼? 안돼? 왜? 아아, 괜히&n허락했어!

1001402438.english: Hmm... The promise to train you, Commander, &n is no joke. Do you have a moment?
1001402438.korean: 흠... 사령관님을 단련시켜 드리겠다는&n말은 농담이 아녜요. 잠깐 시간 될까요?

1001402439.english: Hey, Commander. I tried putting this on, &n and even lined up donuts... &n ...You're not really interested?!
1001402439.korean: 있지, 사령관. 나 이거 입으려고,&n도넛도 막 줄이구… &n...별로 관심 없구나?!

1001402440.english: There are so many things I want to learn from my master. &n Hee… You'll teach me, right?
1001402440.korean: 주인한테는 내가 배우고  싶은 게&n엄청 많아. 히… 가르쳐 줄 거지?

1001402441.english: That day, Commander hugged me tight. &n I probably won't forget it my whole life.
1001402441.korean: 그때 사령관님이 꼭 안아주셨어요.&n아마... 평생 잊지 못할 것 같아요.

1001402442.english: Companion… companion… I want to keep calling you that, &n what should I do?

1001402443.english: It's really hard to go against Your Excellency's wishes. &n You always hit my weak spots and do whatever you want...
1001402443.korean: 각하의 뜻을 거역하는 건 정말&n힘들군요. 약점을 찔러서 뭐든&n제멋대로 해버리시니...

1001402444.english: Um… Commander? Want to try riding a Soufish? &n It's a bit cramped, but &n we can ride together.
1001402444.korean: 음… 사령관? 소우피쉬에 타볼 생각&n없,어? 괘, 괜찮아. 조금 비좁긴 해도,&n둘이 탈 수 있다구.

1001402445.english: Master can be cowardly sometimes. &n They target moments when the heart is weak.
1001402445.korean: 주인님은 가끔 비겁합니다.&n마음이 약해질 때를 노려요.

1001402446.english: Commander, no more external gifts are needed. &n What matters is the heart.
1001402446.korean: 사령관, 이젠 더 이상 외적인 선물은&n필요 없어요. 중요한 건 마음이니까.

1001402447.english: I will never forget that time. &n Your Majesty was truly… romantic then...
1001402447.korean: 저는 그때를 잊을수가 없을 거예요.&n그때, 폐하는 정말… 로맨틱하셨어요...

1001402448.english: Be thankful. What I think is more important &n than war is only you, Commander.
1001402448.korean: 고마워하라고. 내가 전쟁보다 중요하게&n생각하는 건 사령관 뿐이니.

1001402449.english: If there's one complaint about destruction… &n it's that we don't have a last element, &n a home.
1001402449.korean: 멸망에 딱 하나 불만이 있다면…&n우리에게  마지막 요소,&n숙소가 없다는 거군요.

1001402450.english: The heart I received from my master is truly &n a precious memory. I always recall it &n and feel happy.
1001402450.korean: 주인님께 받은 마음은 정말로 좋은&n추억이에요. 전 항상 그 기억을&n떠올리며 기뻐한답니다.

1001402451.english: This is a bit thrilling too. Dating without &n the sisters knowing. &n Hehe, it makes my heart race.
1001402451.korean: 이것도 조금 스릴 있어요. 동생들&n모르게… 연애하는 거요.&n후후, 두근두근하네요.

1001402452.english: Thinking about that time makes me hot again… &n I'll go take a cold bath for a moment.
1001402452.korean: 그땔 생각하면 또 뜨거워져서…&n자, 잠시만 냉수욕 좀 하고 오겠습니다.

1001402453.english: My letter? Please stop. &n No reading aloud!
1001402453.korean: 제 편지 말씀이십니까? 그만둬&n주십시오. 낭독만은 안됩니다!

1001402454.english: Just dressing me like this &n makes me understand my master's heart completely.
1001402454.korean: 이런 옷을 입히신 것만으로도&n주인님의 마음을 다 알 수 있사옵니다.

1001402455.english: Commander, aren't you too embarrassed? &n Why did you cut off the broadcast halfway?
1001402455.korean: 사령관 님 너무 부끄러워 하는 거&n아냐? 왜 그렇게 중간에 중계를&n막은 거야?

1001402456.english: The guns are ready. &n Should I tell the others to leave?
1001402456.korean: 총은 준비됐어요.&n다른 아이들 보고 나가라고 할까요?

1001402457.english: Commander. What is a secret friend? &n Miho was talking about secret friends...
1001402457.korean: 사령관님. 비밀 친구가 뭐예요?&n미호가 비밀 친구 이야기하던데...

1001402458.english: Commander, have you heard of honeymoon? &n Hehe. How about the South Pole? &n I'm sure you'll like it.
1001402458.korean: 사령관, 신혼여행이라고 들어 봤어?&n헤헤. 남극은 어때?&n분명히 좋아할 거야.

1001402459.english: Sometimes thinking about that makes me… &n lose control. Are you feeling okay?
1001402459.korean: 그땔 생각하면 자꾸… 자제를 못 할&n때가 있어요. 몸은 좀 괜찮으신가요?

1001402460.english: Surely, Commander, you were drawn to Linty's &n cuteness too, right?

1001402461.english: Commander, sometimes you look sick. &n Well… it's not that I dislike it though...
1001402461.korean: 사령관, 가끔씩은 약은 것처럼 보여.&n뭐… 그게 싫은 건 아니지만...

1001402462.english: Shall we live in our sea? Then &n Commander will say romantic things again, right?
1001402462.korean: 우리 바다에서 살아 버릴까? 그럼&n사령관이 또 로맨틱한 말을 해주겠지?

1001402463.english: Still… the Moonlight Magical Power &n is strong… Could it be the blessing of the moon?
1001402463.korean: 여전히… 문 라이트 매지컬 파워는&n건재해요… 달의 축복일까요?

1001402464.english: If you keep talking about the Great Demon King, I'll really &n get mad! I'll whip you until you cry!
1001402464.korean: 자꾸 대마왕 이야기하면 진짜&n화낼 거에요! 채찍으로 때려서&n울게 해 줄 거야!

1001402465.english: Do you have any discomfort because your &n love is a magical girl?
1001402465.korean: 저… 애인이 마법 소녀라&n불편한 점은 없으신가요?

1001402466.english: The sisters still don't seem to know about us. &n I'm really glad.
1001402466.korean: 동생들은 아직 우리 사이를&n잘 모르는 것 같아요. 정말 다행이에요.

1001402467.english: You know I'm watching, right? &n If you do something bad, I'll scold you.
1001402467.korean: 제가 지켜보고 있는 거 알고 계시죠?&n나쁜 짓 하면 혼내줄 거예요.

1001402468.english: You've been suspicious lately... Surely, you're not &n lurking around?
1001402468.korean: 당신 요즘 수상해... 설마, 한 눈 팔고&n다니는 거 아니지?

1001402469.english: Why, why, they say I'm a fox-like wife and you're a rabbit-like &n child? &n What should I say?
1001402469.korean: 왜왜, 그 여우 같은 아내와 토끼 같은&n자식이라고 하잖아?&n난 뭐라고 해야 할까?

1001402470.english: Commander, did you brush your teeth? Want to do it with me?

1001402471.english: Hey, what will we do if we cause trouble? ...Ahaha! Really? &n Why haven't you thought about it? Hmm?
1001402471.korean: 있지, 우리... 사고치면 어떻게 할&n생각이야? ...아하하! 정말?&n왜 생각 안 해봤어? 으응?
